name: Rhysida
description: Rhysida is a financially motivated ransomware group first publicly observed in 2023 and known for aggressive double extortion campaigns targeting healthcare, education, government, and other high-impact organizations. The group combines data theft with enterprise-wide encryption and public leak-site
strategic_objectives: Financial extortion through enterprise-wide ransomware deplo
Data theft to increase ransom leverage
Targeting high-pressure sectors where downtime is critical
